privileged_info_summary: The task processes a synthetic patient census XML file containing 5 patient records with IDs 1001-1005. The expected output is 5 separate JSON files, one for each patient. Patient records include: Valerie Tinsley (Cardiology, Room 304-A), Robert Chen (Oncology, Room 210-B), Marcus Johnson (Neurology, Room 405-A), Sarah O'Connor (Orthopedics, Room 102-C), and Elena Rodriguez (Maternity, Room 501-A). The input file is located at /home/ga/Documents/inbox/daily_census.xml and outputs are written to /home/ga/Documents/outbox. The channel to be created is named 'Census_Processor'.
